message:
fix(engine): include denial_records in witness hash and validate set disjointness

Security fixes for capability_witness.rs found during deep audit:

1. denial_records were omitted from unsigned_bytes() hash computation.
   An attacker could modify denial records (remove justifications, alter
   evidence references) after witness creation without invalidating the
   signature or content hash. Now denial_records are included in the
   canonical unsigned bytes alongside proof_obligations.

2. Add required/denied capability set disjointness validation in the
   WitnessBuilder.build() path. A capability appearing in both sets
   simultaneously creates a logical contradiction that breaks witness
   semantics. Now returns RequiredDeniedOverlap error.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
